case_title: SHEEHY, DONNA DBA EXECUTIVE SUPPORT SERVICES VS WICKS, DIANE C/O SABLE TECHNOLOGIES, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,037.24 FILED BY SHEEHY, DONNA DBA EXECUTIVE SUPPORT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT WICKS, DIANE C/O SABLE TECHNOLOGIES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WICKS, DIANE C/O SABLE TECHNOLOGIES, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHEEHY, DONNA DBA EXECUTIVE SUPPORT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WICKS, DIANE C/O SABLE TECHNOLOGIES, INC. $1,037.24 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,077.24 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $139.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $7.49 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT WICKS, DIANE C/O SABLE TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WICKS, DIANE C/O SABLE TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT WICKS, DIANE C/O SABLE TECHNOLOGIES, INC. HEARING SET FOR MAY-06-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAY-06-1997, DENIED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WICKS, DIANE C/O SABLE TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
